nasb.text: How the hammer of the whole earth Has been cut off and broken! How Babylon has become An object of horror among the nations!

esv.text: How the hammer of the whole earth is cut down and broken! How Babylon has become a horror among the nations!

cnv.text: 擊打全地的大鎚，怎麼被砍斷毀掉！ 巴比倫在列國中，怎麼成了令人驚駭的對象呢！

ccb.text: 威震天下的锤子巴比伦怎么被砍断、打碎了！ 它的下场令列国震惊。
